metaData.SAP Product Name: SOU SO-1716-R HYBRID DISPOSABLE GLOVES - REGULAR 50S 1S

product.name: Sou Hybrid Disposable Gloves - Regular Size

metaData.Key Information:
• Coated internally with pure soothing aloe vera gel that keeps hands cool and comfortable
• Provides excellent protection
metaData.Preparation:
• Gloves Care:
1. After use, rinse the gloves with clean water and dry thoroughly
• Caution:
1. Avoid contact with petrol, mineral oil, paraffin and turpentine substances
2. Replace the gloves if damaged, punctured or torn
3. May cause allergic reactions in some people as this product is made of natural rubber latex
metaData.Storage Information:
• Avoid direct sunlight
• Store in cool, dry place

product.name: 3M Scotch-Brite Aloe Vera Coated Gloves - Large

metaData.Key Information: With a thicker 3-layered-structure formulated by Japan advanced R&D, the sheets contain special microfibres to capture and hold more dust and hair.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Open the pack by tearing the centre perforated line in the front of the pack and take out a piece of dry sheet
2. Spread out the sheet and place the wiper head at the centre
3. Wrap both ends over the wiper head and press into the 4 openings
• Note:
1. Both sides of the sheet are usable
metaData.SAP Product Name: MAGICLEAN WIPER DRY SHEET TRIPLE PACK 20S 1S
metaData.Storage Information: Do not leave sheet on plain wood for extended period of time as this may result in discolouration
